name: neopolitan-context-meta
description: Meta-pipeline for skill libraries — the lifecycle skills that author, audit, refactor, and retire other skills.

plugins.name: context-meta-pipeline
plugins.description: Five-skill lifecycle pipeline (skill-author, family-bootstrap, skill-audit, skill-refactor, skill-retire) plus governance docs and Python validators. Skills that govern skills.

plugins.name: context-site-build
plugins.description: Site-build methodology library — skills that draft, audit, and synthesize the deliverables of a 7-phase site/web-app build (discovery → requirements → design → build → hardening → launch → post-launch).
